subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O Sustainer of all names and Sovereign of the throne and the earth! I beseech Thee by Thy Most Great, Most Impregnable, Most Holy Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا قیوم الاسماء و مالک العرش و الثری اسئلک باسمک الاعظم الامنع الاقدس
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
